commits_audited: f67d25e — BUG-L-CANDLE-Y-MISMATCH (candle Y→-4.85) + GLB body name-guard /body|bowl/i

candle_y_positions.note: CANDLE_POSITIONS in LairGLBAssets.ts line 8-12 matches exactly — procedural + GLB paths are in sync

glb_body_name_guard.note: Regex name-guard correct. Nullish coalescence (??) ensures fallback to first mesh when no match. emissiveIntensity initialised to 0.0 before callback — hover state is clean.

map_sublabel_slighe.found: Les slighe s'ouvrent aux voyageurs initiés
map_sublabel_slighe.note: Celtic term present, correct apostrophe (escaped \'), accented final 'é' intact

cauldron_glb_loaded_callback.note: Callback chain correct: traverse → filter Mesh → name-guard → set emissive → call onCauldronGLBLoaded. Guard `if (bodyMesh)` prevents null-dereference when GLB has no meshes.

toast_no_max_stacking.note: showZoneToast() does `if (activeToast) { activeToast.remove(); activeToast = null; }` before appending new toast — only 1 toast active at a time. However rapid successive zone-clicks within the 220ms removal transition could briefly show 2 overlapping toasts (old fading out + new fading in). Severity LOW: cosmetic race, invisible in normal play pace.

cauldron_procedural_y_alignment.note: GLB cauldron is placed at y=-4.65. Procedural cauldron Y not audited this cycle (out of read budget). If procedural cauldron base differs from -4.65, a visible pop may occur during GLB load on slow networks. LOW: GLB path is primary; procedural is short-lived fallback.

bundle_concern.assessment: 0.45 KB over target. Not a hard blocker — threshold is a soft guideline, not a deploy gate. Recommend monitoring; defer action unless bundle grows further in C48+.

criteria.name: Geometry correctness (candle Y)
criteria.rationale: All three candle Y coords confirmed at -4.85 in both procedural (MerlinLairScene.ts) and GLB path (LairGLBAssets.ts CANDLE_POSITIONS). Full alignment.

criteria.name: GLB fallback robustness
criteria.rationale: name-guard regex + nullish coalescing + null-guard on bodyMesh covers all edge cases (mesh named body/bowl, unnamed mesh, empty GLB).

criteria.name: Hover/interactivity state
criteria.rationale: emissiveIntensity initialised to 0.0 before callback hand-off ensures no phantom glow on GLB load. onCauldronGLBLoaded wires visualMesh correctly.

criteria.name: Localisation / Celtic authenticity
criteria.rationale: Sublabel 'Les slighe s'ouvrent aux voyageurs initiés' verified verbatim. Correct escaped apostrophe in source, accented chars intact.

criteria.name: Toast UX (zone labels)
criteria.rationale: Single-toast enforcement works for normal play. Minor cosmetic race on rapid clicks (220ms gap) not fixed. Deduction 1pt for open LOW.

criteria.name: Material consistency
criteria.rationale: candleMat metalness:0.0, candleGroup hidden on GLB load, shelfMat metalness:0.0 (commit 5918675). crystalMat roughness 0.25 applied. No regressions observed.

criteria.name: GLB load failure safety (procedural fallback)
criteria.rationale: All five loadGLB() calls use .catch(() => {}) — procedural meshes remain visible on network failure. Correct for offline/slow-network resilience.

criteria.name: Bundle size
criteria.rationale: 200.45 KB gzip is 0.45 KB over soft target. Not blocking. Deduction 1pt as a minor pressure indicator.

criteria.name: Code hygiene / no regressions in audit scope
criteria.rationale: No console.log, no any-type, no hardcoded secrets in audited files. Immutable patterns respected (clone(true) for GLB instances).

criteria.name: Accessibility (toast ARIA)
criteria.rationale: Toast has role='status', aria-live='polite', aria-atomic='true'. Screen-reader compatible.

criteria.name: Synchronisation procedural ↔ GLB coordinates
criteria.rationale: Comment on MerlinLairScene.ts line 296 explicitly cross-references CANDLE_POSITIONS in LairGLBAssets.ts. Developer contract documented in-code.

criteria.name: Door flow / resolve timing
criteria.rationale: Door click shows toast then resolves after 400ms — sufficient read time before cutToBlack. Non-door zones show toast without resolving (correct guard `if (zone === 'door')`). No softlock risk.

open_issues.description: Rapid zone-clicks within 220ms removal transition can cause brief visual overlap of two toasts.
open_issues.recommendation: Acceptable for C47. If closing in C48, add `toast.getAnimations().forEach(a => a.finish())` before remove() to collapse transition instantly.

open_issues.description: GLB cauldron placed at y=-4.65; procedural cauldron Y not verified this cycle. Potential pop on slow-network GLB load if Y values differ.
open_issues.recommendation: Verify procedural cauldron body Y in MerlinLairScene.ts in C48. If mismatch: align procedural to -4.65.

summary.release_recommendation: GREEN — ship C47. Monitor bundle in C48. Address 2 LOW issues at convenience.
